name: donchian_breakout_trend_xau_m5
hypothesis: XAUUSD M5 exhibits strong impulsive continuation after breaking recent N-bar extremes during high-ADX regimes; trading Donchian breakouts filtered by trend strength and session liquidity captures momentum without mean-reversion bleed.

signals.entry_long: close > donchian_upper(20) previous bar AND close > ema(50)
signals.entry_short: close < donchian_lower(20) previous bar AND close < ema(50)

rules: session_mask: London 07:00-11:00 UTC OR NY 13:00-17:00 UTC
regime_filter.skip_when: adx < 22 OR atr_percentile < 40 OR outside sessions

exits.trailing: chandelier: 3*atr(14) from highest high since entry, activates after +1.5 atr profit
